crash_type: Heap-buffer-overflow READ (over-read / use-of-uninitialized-value of the string buffer)
signature: int ndpi_is_printable_string(char * const str, size_t len)
params: char * const str - buffer scanned for printable chars; non-printable bytes rewritten to '?'; in the vulnerable path it is the 2048-byte stack rdnSeqBuf
size_t len - number of bytes of str to inspect; in the vulnerable path it is rdn_len, advanced by snprintf's would-have-written return value and thus can exceed the valid/initialized region of str
harness_callchain: LLVMFuzzerTestOneInput -> pcap_open_offline(input as pcap) -> ndpi_workflow_process_packet -> ndpi_detection_process_packet / check_ndpi_detection_func -> ndpi_search_tls_wrapper -> ndpi_search_tls_tcp -> processTLSBlock -> processCertificate -> processCertificateElements -> ndpi_is_printable_string(rdnSeqBuf, rdn_len)
